'''Fyodos''', also known as '''Tatrang IV''', was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that was located within the [[Tatrang system]]. The world's surface was devastated during the [[Great Cleansing]], a war of mass destruction that took place in [[350 BBY/Legends|350 BBY]]. Prior to the cataclysm, the surface possessed two main seas, one of which was called the [[Othlorian Sea]].

{{Planet-stub}}
